keyword: best dog gps tracker for hiking off leash
title: Best Dog GPS Tracker for Hiking & Off-Leash Trails
meta: Rugged, long-range GPS trackers built for hikes, forests and off-leash adventures.
intro: Trail dogs cover miles. You need real-time tracking with a rugged, waterproof build and battery that survives a full day out.

sections.body: On remote trails, cellular real-time needs coverage; mesh/radio trackers work where phones don't but need you to be within range.
Look for 12-24h on a charge; bring a power bank for multi-day trips.
IP67+ water resistance and a shock-proof collar mount survive bush and water.

products.name: Long-Range Radio Dog Tracker
products.asin_query: long range radio dog tracker off leash

products.name: Dog GPS Collar Mount
products.blurb: Secure the unit to any collar.

faq.q: Do they work in deep forest?
faq.a: Cellular ones lose signal under heavy canopy; radio/mesh fare better short-range.
Keep the unit under ~10% of your dog's weight for comfort.
